issues.description: Condition uses HasCardOnBoard with name 'Whitebeard Pirates', but the effect text says 'If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"'. This should use LeaderHasType or LeaderHasAnyType condition instead.
SearchDeck action is missing the cost filter. Effect text specifies 'Character card with a cost of 2', but DSL only filters by cardType without cost constraint.
SearchDeck action is missing the count specification. Effect text says 'look at 5 cards from the top of your deck' and 'reveal up to 1', but DSL has no count fields.
PlayFromHand action is missing the 'rested' specification. Effect text explicitly states 'play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 2 from your hand rested', but DSL has no rested property.
PlayFromHand uses maxCost: 2, but effect text specifies 'cost of 2' (exact cost). Should use cost: 2 instead.
